input.background: Calculate the mean and standard deviation of each group depicted in each of the side-by-side stemplots in this problem. Discuss how these statistics relate to what you see.
input.question: (b) Comparison B: Calculate the mean and standard deviation for Group 1 and Group 2 based on the stemplot. Discuss how these statistics relate to what you see.

output.answer: Group 1: \(\bar{x}=70\) and \(s=15.8\). Group 2: \(\bar{x}=50\) and \(s=15.8\). How statistics relate to what we see: Higher central location in Group 1; equal group spreads.
